title: There's a Lesson in That Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Not allowed by law or rules
rounds.answer: illegal
rounds.explanation: illegal: Not allowed by law or rules

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A big change in the form or shape of something
rounds.answer: metamorphosis
rounds.explanation: metamorphosis: A big change in the form or shape of something

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The act of being set free from control or restrictions
rounds.answer: emancipation
rounds.explanation: emancipation: The act of being set free from control or restrictions

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The act of going into a place, or the way to get in
rounds.answer: entry

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The activity of fighting in a war
rounds.answer: warfare

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Showed or bounced back an image or light; thought carefully
rounds.answer: reflected

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: It is illegal to steal someone else's property.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The choir sang in harmony, making beautiful music.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The juror listened carefully to all the evidence before deciding.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Voices in the Chamber, part 2': "This is an _____ my father uses to measure wood.
rounds.answer: instrument
rounds.explanation: The text says: "This is an instrument my father uses to measure wood.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Voices in the Chamber, part 1': At home, Father said, "We've been _____ with little, and asked to give much." Mother added, "These laws — none of...
rounds.answer: supplied
rounds.explanation: The text says: At home, Father said, "We've been supplied with little, and asked to give much." Mother added, "These laws — none of them reflect our voice." Noah couldn't sleep that night.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Voices in the Chamber, part 2': "It's not _____ if we are not heard." He lifted a cloth-wrapped item and unrolled it on the desk.
rounds.answer: harmony
rounds.explanation: The text says: "It's not harmony if we are not heard." He lifted a cloth-wrapped item and unrolled it on the desk.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Retell a Fable from Memory
rounds.target: It is illegal to steal someone else's property.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Vocabulary Expert Interview
rounds.target: The choir sang in harmony, making beautiful music.

rounds.target: The juror listened carefully to all the evidence before deciding.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The lake reflected the beautiful trees around it.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Nationalism can make people feel proud during national celebrations.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The parliament met to discuss new rules for schools.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'inventor' mean in this unit?
choices: A person who creates something new
Not allowed by law or rules
A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
rounds.answer: A person who creates something new
rounds.explanation: inventor: A person who creates something new

rounds.prompt: What does 'nationalism' mean in this unit?
choices: Not allowed by law or rules
A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
The belief that your country is important and worth being proud of
rounds.answer: The belief that your country is important and worth being proud of
rounds.explanation: nationalism: The belief that your country is important and worth being proud of

rounds.prompt: What does 'instrument' mean in this unit?
choices: A pleasing combination of things that work well together; peace
A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
Not allowed by law or rules
rounds.answer: A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
rounds.explanation: instrument: A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'reflected'?
rounds.answer: Verb
rounds.explanation: reflected is used as a verb in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'parliament'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: parliament is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'censor'?
rounds.answer: Verb
rounds.explanation: censor is used as a verb in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
A pleasing combination of things that work well together; peace
The activity of fighting in a war

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A person who creates something new

The official approval of something, like a law or agreement

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: The belief that your country is important and worth being proud of

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'instrument' mean?
choices: A pleasing combination of things that work well together; peace
A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
A way of looking at or thinking about something
To remove or hide parts of something considered inappropriate
rounds.answer: A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
rounds.explanation: She plays the piano, which is a musical instrument.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Voices in the Chamber, part 1': People said _____ taxes were coming.
rounds.answer: illegal
rounds.explanation: The text says: People said illegal taxes were coming.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Voices in the Chamber, part 2': "I would invite _____ elders, Muslim clerics, boatmakers, and farmers.
rounds.answer: citizen
rounds.explanation: The text says: "I would invite citizen elders, Muslim clerics, boatmakers, and farmers.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'illegal' mean?
choices: A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
Gave or provided something that was needed
Not allowed by law or rules
The act of going into a place, or the way to get in
rounds.answer: Not allowed by law or rules
rounds.explanation: It is illegal to steal someone else's property.

rounds.prompt: What does 'citizen' mean?
choices: A person who follows the teachings of Jesus Christ
A pleasing combination of things that work well together; peace
A tool or device used to make music or do a specific job
Gave or provided something that was needed
rounds.answer: A person who follows the teachings of Jesus Christ
rounds.explanation: My friend is a citizen and goes to church every Sunday.

rounds.prompt: What does 'entry' mean?
choices: A pleasing combination of things that work well together; peace
A way of looking at or thinking about something
Gave or provided something that was needed
The act of going into a place, or the way to get in
rounds.answer: The act of going into a place, or the way to get in
rounds.explanation: You need a ticket for entry to the concert.
